prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the EA888 Gen3 (CJXC/CJXB) 2.0L TSI engine with upgraded IS38 turbocharger, utilizing a custom 3.5" downpipe (Catted, Vibrant 1799 GESI) and APR Carbonio intake system with heat-shielded inlet pipe for optimized airflow and IAT reduction

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the MQB platform, paired with H&R 24mm front and 22mm rear anti-roll bars (adjustable end-links) to eliminate body roll while maintaining OEM+ ride quality on 18x8.5 ET42 BBS CH-R wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect 235/40/18 tires

Unitronic Big Turbo Upgrade (BTU) kit featuring a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) with upgraded 750cc Bosch Motorsport injectors, high-flow fuel pump (Walbro 450 LPH), and custom-mapped DSG TCU for launch control at 4,500 RPM with 0.05s shift times
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (MQB-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended rockers, paired with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and OEM+ gloss black roof for contrast

VWR R-Line carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips (REMUS Valved Sport Exhaust), and a custom front splitter with adjustable canards (APR GT4-style) for -120kg of downforce at 120mph

OEM Euro-spec LED tail lights (VW Part #5G0945096G) with smoked lenses, retrofitted with Osram LED bulbs (2700K color temp), and a custom carbon fiber engine cover (034 Motorsport) featuring a red-stitched VW Motorsport logo and integrated cold-air intake scoop
